recommendations.title: The Grad Job
recommendations.overview: Teenagers, in their last year of High School, steel the subjects of the Baccalaureate from the education exam division in order to succeed at the exam.

recommendations.title: A Town Called Panic
recommendations.overview: Cowboy and Indian's only wish was to come up with a brilliant idea for Mr Horse's birthday, but when their plan ends up in utter disaster, they'll need to travel the world and back to make things right again.

recommendations.title: Necessary Roughness
recommendations.overview: When the Texas State University Fightin' Armadillos football team is disqualified for cheating and poor grades, the University is forced to pick from a team that actually goes to school. Will they even win a single game?

recommendations.title: The Blue Dahlia
recommendations.overview: Soon after a veteran returns from war, his cheating wife is found dead. He evades police in an attempt to find the real murderer.

recommendations.title: The Promise
recommendations.overview: Set during the last days of the Ottoman Empire, a love triangle develops between Mikael, a brilliant medical student, the beautiful and sophisticated artist Ana, and Chris, a renowned American journalist based in Paris.

recommendations.title: 12th Fail

recommendations.title: The Paramedic
recommendations.overview: Unable to face his new reality in a wheelchair, Ángel develops a deadly obsession with the woman who left him and unleashes a sinister revenge plot.

recommendations.title: Monica and Friends: Bonds

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Lambs
recommendations.overview: Clarice Starling is a top student at the FBI's training academy.  Jack Crawford wants Clarice to interview Dr. Hannibal Lecter, a brilliant psychiatrist who is also a violent psychopath, serving life behind bars for various acts of murder and canniba

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.
